sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96327" key="stafulokau/sths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στᾰφῠλο-καύστης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σταφυλιο-</foreign> (q.v.), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:79" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.79</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
